## Improve vague prompts with structure

Below are four prompts that are intentionally vague. Your task is to improve
each one by adding **Role**, **Context**, **Task**, and **Format**.

Test the improved version in an AI tool and assess the difference in output.

### Prompt 1

> Write an email about the project.

### Prompt 2

> Help me create a presentation.

### Prompt 3

> Summarize this report.

### Prompt 4

> Give me feedback on my text.

**Success criteria:** Each improved prompt contains all four building blocks.
The model's answer is noticeably more relevant and useful than the answer to
the original prompt.
